CustomField.description: The API name of the Contact field used to determine gender for reciprocal relationship type assignment. For example, a "Father" relationship might create a reciprocal "Daughter" or "Son" based on the related Contact's gender field value. Only used when the Reciprocal Method is set to "List Setting." Leave blank if gender-based reciprocals are not needed.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Contact field API name used for gender-based reciprocal relationship types. Only applies with the "List Setting" reciprocal method.
CustomField.label: Gender Field
